responsibility: Machine-readable, auditable metadata for an approved release. The artifact_id of this artifact is the reference target for the release approval entry in decision_log.yaml.

notes.id_field: The `id` field is the stable artifact identifier required by runtime_contract.md Section 3.2. It is the value referenced in the decision_log.yaml human approval entry for the RELEASE_REVIEW → RELEASED gate.
notes.supersedes_id: Set to the id of the prior release_metadata.json if this is a corrected or revised release record. Null for first-attempt release records.

_changelog.change: Renamed release_id to id for consistency with runtime_contract.md Section 3 artifact identity model. Added supersedes_id and run_id fields (AC-02). Added review_result_hash to inputs for hash-binding consistency with GV-04.
